query_normalized: neuromorphic transformer networks: spiking neural dynamics in language models neuroscience
rationale: This paper focuses on FPGA-based SNN hardware emulation and general connectivity patterns, but does not address the core components of the user's question: Transformer architecture or Language Models. While it covers spiking neural networks (part of the user's domain), it lacks the critical transformer/NLP dimension, making it off-domain for a literature review on neuromorphic transformers in language models.
